// Abridged excerpt of a real rolldown-bundled SvelteKit server
// (examples/websocket, @sveltejs/kit 2.42.2) BEFORE the adapter's websocket
// patch. Regenerate by commenting out the patch call in index.ts, running
// `bun run build` in examples/websocket, and excerpting get_hooks() and the
// Server class init region from build/server/index.js.
};
async function get_hooks() {
	let handle;
	let handleFetch;
	let handleError;
	let handleValidationError;
	let init;
	({handle, handleFetch, handleError, handleValidationError, init} = await import("./chunks/hooks.server-3npctzz_.js"));
	let reroute;
	let transport;
	return {
		handle,
		handleFetch,
		handleError,
		handleValidationError,
		init,
		reroute,
		transport
	}
	/**
	* @param {import('@sveltejs/kit').ServerInitOptions} opts
	*/
	async init({ env, read }) {
		const { env_public_prefix, env_private_prefix } = this.#options;
		filter_env(env, env_private_prefix, env_public_prefix);
		set_public_env(filter_env(env, env_public_prefix, env_private_prefix));
		if (read) {
			const wrapped_read = (file) => {
				const result = read(file);
				if (result instanceof ReadableStream) return result;
				else return new ReadableStream({ async start(controller) {
					try {
						const stream = await Promise.resolve(result);
						if (!stream) {
							controller.close();
							return;
						}
						const reader = stream.getReader();
						while (true) {
							const { done, value } = await reader.read();
							if (done) break;
							controller.enqueue(value);
						}
						controller.close();
					} catch (error2) {
						controller.error(error2);
					}
				} });
			};
			set_read_implementation(wrapped_read);
		}
		await (init_promise ??= (async () => {
			try {
				const module = await get_hooks();
				this.#options.hooks = {
					handle: module.handle || (({ event, resolve: resolve2 }) => resolve2(event)),
					handleError: module.handleError || (({ status, error: error2, event }) => {
						const error_message = format_server_error(
							status,
